title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses OpenClaw security risks affecting autonomous AI agents, including prompt injection and credential exposure vulnerabilities. The video examines how agent autonomy, tools, and memory systems create real-world security exposures and offers guidance on safer deployment practices.
